text: Namaste! Dr. Sharma ki clinic mein aapka swagat hai. Main aapki virtual receptionist hoon. Aaj main aapki kaise help kar sakti hoon?
Priya ji, aapka shukriya! Aap kisi khaas problem ke liye aa rahi hain ya general checkup ke liye?
Theek hai! Aap kab aana chahti hain?
10 baje ka slot available hai. Kya main confirm kar doon — Dr. Sharma ke saath kal subah 10:00 AM. Priya ji, sahi hai na?
Perfect! Priya ji, aapka appointment book ho gaya — Dr. Sharma ke saath, kal subah 10:00 AM. Aapko SMS aa jayega confirm details ke saath. Koi aur help chahiye?
Shukriya Priya ji! Get well soon. Alvida!
